artifacts.title: Think receipt from 2022-09-10
artifacts.excerpt:
Did you know the secret of shitposting

We find things we believe to be 100% profoundly true that we know other people will think is so wildly false it must be a joke, dress it up as one and watch it fly  

It’s a Kegan tease lol 

This is how we find each other
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: think, don, time, good.

artifacts.title: Think receipt from 2022-02-13
artifacts.excerpt: I think I'm still heartbroken from the breakdown of my last crew who simply had the vibe of "Let's have some fun. Let's make something, just because." And then we would make something and it would be fun. That ended nearly three years ago and I've been lost ever since.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: think, don, time, good.

artifacts.title: Think receipt from 2020-10-23
artifacts.excerpt: Suddenly have this strong feeling that thoughts are pretty fucking crazy when you think about it. Pictures and sounds in your head wtf

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2022-08-14
artifacts.excerpt: I love how Buddhist books put the message into one profound paragraph at the beginning so that if you’re smart you don’t have to read the rest of the book. I wish every book was like this.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2020-11-03
artifacts.excerpt:
One advantage of being Other / bullied from a young age is that you don't build your self-esteem from other people's opinions of you. Foundations are largely internal. 

Disadvantage is in later life you ignore good people who you should be building relationships with.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, know, want, things.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2021-12-19
artifacts.excerpt:
It’s strange. I had a feeling I should book a flight to England for very early in December, so I did. It’s nice here. Xmas is pleasant. Everyone is responding to me v positively, I don’t know why. I’m navigating by feel. I’m relaxed, I don’t know why. 
Is this 🤲🦋 Heart?

artifacts.title: Good receipt from 2020-02-23
artifacts.excerpt:
Meta-rats talking:

metarat1: heads
metarat2: I agree, but also tails
metarat1: yes I agree about tails

both in unison: this is the same coin

metarat1: but it's good to argue the side for heads
metarat2: yes, and also for tails

both in unison: yes

artifacts.title: Good receipt from 2020-06-23
artifacts.excerpt: Hey NYT, I stand in support of SlateStarCodex. Revealing his full name will fuck up his life. It would be bullying. His writing was honest, his opinions measured and he always attempted to be balanced and argue in good faith. Maybe you could take a leaf out of his book.

They make it clear the child is a burden to them, and make them feel guilty for having needs. 

They also praise the child when they’re quiet, being “good” is being silent

planets.name: Time
planets.summary: Archive cluster around time: 407 posts; 4 quote-backed receipts pinned.

artifacts.title: Time receipt from 2021-03-06
artifacts.excerpt: Spending 45 mins daily attending closely to all five senses (as well as thoughts) makes me realise just how much time I've spent in thoughts during my life so far. It now seems like a survival, distraction tactic that is borderline disassociation. Poor Jess.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: time, long, now, every.

artifacts.title: Time receipt from 2019-05-31
artifacts.excerpt: Short thread on my first experience of meta-systematicity, “fluid mode” or Kegan’s interindividual stage. I remember the first time I questioned a system - it was political. I was throughly versed in the feminist, sjw system and more broadly the leftist spectrum
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: time, long, now, every.

artifacts.title: Time receipt from 2020-11-03
artifacts.excerpt:
Thinking of these iconic guys as spiritual precursors to emo, and realising for the first time that a big part of emo was maybe about bisexual and queer men expressing themselves. 

They are: Billy Joe Armstrong, Brian Molko, Kurt Cobain, Richey Edwards. https://t.co/l1gfd1DqRV
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: time, long, now, every.

artifacts.title: Time receipt from 2020-09-24
artifacts.excerpt:
I was 31 before I realised you could see the Milky Way with the naked eye. I’ve just seen it for the second time in dark countryside... and with binoculars! 

It. Is. Amazing. 

🌌
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: time, long, now, every.
